a:hallway-eight|tagline.text: Locked in after hours. Follow the corridor to the fire exit.
a:hallway-eight|tagline.postedit: Locked in after hours. Follow the corridor to the fire exit.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|0.text: The fluorescent lights hum softly overhead.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|0.postedit: The fluorescent lights hum softly overhead.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|1.text: The ceiling lights give off a steady, even glow.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|1.postedit: The ceiling lights give off a steady, even glow.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|2.text: Overhead, the fluorescents buzz at their usual pitch.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|2.postedit: Overhead, the fluorescents buzz at their usual pitch.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|3.text: The lighting is flat and unremarkable, the way it always is.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|v:steady|3.postedit: The lighting is flat and unremarkable, the way it always is.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:flicker|0.text: One of the fluorescent tubes stutters, then holds.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:flicker|0.postedit: One of the fluorescent tubes stutters, then holds.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:flicker|1.text: The lights flicker, once, twice, before settling.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:flicker|1.postedit: The lights flicker, once, twice, before settling.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:flicker|2.text: There's a faint strobe to the ceiling lights that wasn't there before.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:flicker|2.postedit: There's a faint strobe to the ceiling lights that wasn't there before.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:dim|0.text: The corridor seems a shade darker than you remember.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:dim|0.postedit: The corridor seems a shade darker than you remember.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:dim|1.text: The lights are dimmer here, as if half of them gave up.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:dim|1.postedit: The lights are dimmer here, as if half of them gave up.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:dim|2.text: A grey dimness has settled over everything.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:dim|2.postedit: A grey dimness has settled over everything.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:warm|0.text: The light has a warm, yellowish cast to it.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:warm|0.postedit: The light has a warm, yellowish cast to it.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:warm|1.text: The fluorescents glow oddly amber, almost like sunset.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:warm|1.postedit: The fluorescents glow oddly amber, almost like sunset.

a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:warm|2.text: The usual cold white has turned faintly golden.
a:hallway-eight|p:lighting|x:warm|2.postedit: The usual cold white has turned faintly golden.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|v:vent|0.text: Somewhere, ventilation exhales a low, constant breath.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|v:vent|0.postedit: Somewhere, ventilation exhales a low, constant breath.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|v:vent|1.text: The air handling hums in the walls, steady as ever.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|v:vent|1.postedit: The air handling hums in the walls, steady as ever.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|v:vent|2.text: You hear the familiar drone of distant ventilation.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|v:vent|2.postedit: You hear the familiar drone of distant ventilation.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:drip|0.text: A slow drip taps somewhere out of sight.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:drip|0.postedit: A slow drip taps somewhere out of sight.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:drip|1.text: Water is dripping, you can't place where.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:drip|1.postedit: Water is dripping, you can't place where.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:drip|2.text: Tick. Tick. Something is dripping nearby.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:drip|2.postedit: Tick. Tick. Something is dripping nearby.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:silence|0.text: The ventilation has stopped. The silence presses on your ears.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:silence|0.postedit: The ventilation has stopped. The silence presses on your ears.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:silence|1.text: It is completely quiet. Too quiet.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:silence|1.postedit: It is completely quiet. Too quiet.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:silence|2.text: You notice the hum is gone. The stillness feels wrong.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:silence|2.postedit: You notice the hum is gone. The stillness feels wrong.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:footsteps|0.text: Footsteps echo somewhere behind you, then stop.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:footsteps|0.postedit: Footsteps echo somewhere behind you, then stop.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:footsteps|1.text: You hear footsteps that don't match your own.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:footsteps|1.postedit: You hear footsteps that don't match your own.

a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:footsteps|2.text: For a moment there are two sets of footsteps.
a:hallway-eight|p:sound|x:footsteps|2.postedit: For a moment there are two sets of footsteps.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|0.text: A faded travel poster clings to the wall, a beach, a blue sky.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|0.postedit: A faded travel poster clings to the wall, a beach, a blue sky.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|1.text: The old poster of a sunny coastline is still taped to the wall.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|1.postedit: The old poster of a sunny coastline is still taped to the wall.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|2.text: On the wall, that washed-out advertisement for somewhere warm.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|2.postedit: On the wall, that washed-out advertisement for somewhere warm.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|3.text: The travel poster hangs at its usual slight tilt.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|v:travel|3.postedit: The travel poster hangs at its usual slight tilt.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:gone|0.text: The wall is bare. A pale rectangle marks where a poster used to be.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:gone|0.postedit: The wall is bare. A pale rectangle marks where a poster used to be.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:gone|1.text: The travel poster is gone; only the tape remains.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:gone|1.postedit: The travel poster is gone; only the tape remains.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:gone|2.text: Nothing hangs on the wall now.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:gone|2.postedit: Nothing hangs on the wall now.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:mountains|0.text: The poster shows snow-capped mountains, not a beach.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:mountains|0.postedit: The poster shows snow-capped mountains, not a beach.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:mountains|1.text: The coastline poster is now a photograph of grey mountains.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:mountains|1.postedit: The coastline poster is now a photograph of grey mountains.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:mountains|2.text: The advertisement pictures a cold summit under heavy cloud.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:mountains|2.postedit: The advertisement pictures a cold summit under heavy cloud.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:upside|0.text: The travel poster hangs upside down.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:upside|0.postedit: The travel poster hangs upside down.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:upside|1.text: The beach on the poster is inverted, sky at the bottom.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:upside|1.postedit: The beach on the poster is inverted, sky at the bottom.

a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:upside|2.text: Someone has flipped the poster; it hangs the wrong way up.
a:hallway-eight|p:poster|x:upside|2.postedit: Someone has flipped the poster; it hangs the wrong way up.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|0.text: Far down the corridor, a man in a grey suit walks away from you.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|0.postedit: Far down the corridor, a man in a grey suit walks away from you.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|1.text: A suited figure moves ahead in the distance, back turned.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|1.postedit: A suited figure moves ahead in the distance, back turned.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|2.text: The man in grey is up ahead, as always, walking on.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|2.postedit: The man in grey is up ahead, as always, walking on.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|3.text: Down the hall, a man in a suit recedes towards the vanishing point.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|v:distant|3.postedit: Down the hall, a man in a suit recedes towards the vanishing point.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:closer|0.text: The man in the grey suit is much closer than he should be.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:closer|0.postedit: The man in the grey suit is much closer than he should be.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:closer|1.text: The suited figure has stopped halfway, closer than before.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:closer|1.postedit: The suited figure has stopped halfway, closer than before.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:closer|2.text: The man in grey is only a few paces ahead now, still turned away.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:closer|2.postedit: The man in grey is only a few paces ahead now, still turned away.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:facing|0.text: The man in the grey suit has stopped. He is facing you.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:facing|0.postedit: The man in the grey suit has stopped. He is facing you.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:facing|1.text: Down the hall, the suited figure stands still, looking your way.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:facing|1.postedit: Down the hall, the suited figure stands still, looking your way.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:facing|2.text: The man in grey is not walking. He is watching you.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:facing|2.postedit: The man in grey is not walking. He is watching you.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:gone|0.text: The corridor ahead is empty. No one is walking it.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:gone|0.postedit: The corridor ahead is empty. No one is walking it.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:gone|1.text: There is no figure ahead this time.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:gone|1.postedit: There is no figure ahead this time.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:gone|2.text: The man in the grey suit is nowhere to be seen.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:gone|2.postedit: The man in the grey suit is nowhere to be seen.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:knows|0.text: The man in grey has turned and raised a hand, as if he knows you.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:knows|0.postedit: The man in grey has turned and raised a hand, as if he knows you.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:knows|1.text: The suited figure faces you and beckons, slow and deliberate.
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:knows|1.postedit: The suited figure faces you and beckons, slow and deliberate.

a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:knows|2.text: The man mouths something down the corridor. It might be 'again.'
a:hallway-eight|p:figure|x:knows|2.postedit: The man mouths something down the corridor. It might be 'again.'

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|0.text: The illuminated {SIGN} sign glows at the far end.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|0.postedit: The illuminated {SIGN} sign glows at the far end.

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|1.text: Ahead, the {SIGN} sign hangs above the corridor.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|1.postedit: Ahead, the {SIGN} sign hangs above the corridor.

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|2.text: The green {SIGN} sign points the way, as it should.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|2.postedit: The green {SIGN} sign points the way, as it should.

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|3.text: You can make out the {SIGN} sign in the distance.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|v:exit|3.postedit: You can make out the {SIGN} sign in the distance.

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:reversed|0.text: The exit sign points the wrong way, EXIT ←.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:reversed|0.postedit: The exit sign points the wrong way, EXIT ←.

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:reversed|1.text: The arrow on the exit sign now points back the way you came: ←.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:reversed|1.postedit: The arrow on the exit sign now points back the way you came: ←.

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:dark|0.text: The exit sign is dark. No light behind the letters.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:dark|0.postedit: The exit sign is dark. No light behind the letters.

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:dark|1.text: The exit sign has gone out.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:dark|1.postedit: The exit sign has gone out.

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:dark|2.text: Where the exit sign should glow, there is only a dead panel.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:dark|2.postedit: Where the exit sign should glow, there is only a dead panel.

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:number|0.text: The sign reads EXIT 3. There was never a number on it.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:number|0.postedit: The sign reads EXIT 3. There was never a number on it.

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:number|1.text: A number has appeared on the sign: EXIT 3.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:number|1.postedit: A number has appeared on the sign: EXIT 3.

a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:number|2.text: The exit sign now carries a numeral you don't remember: 3.
a:hallway-eight|p:sign|x:number|2.postedit: The exit sign now carries a numeral you don't remember: 3.

a:hallway-eight|p:door|v:closed|0.text: A grey maintenance door sits shut in the left wall.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|v:closed|0.postedit: A grey maintenance door sits shut in the left wall.

a:hallway-eight|p:door|v:closed|1.text: The service door on your left is closed, as usual.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|v:closed|1.postedit: The service door on your left is closed, as usual.

a:hallway-eight|p:door|v:closed|2.text: There's the maintenance door, shut tight.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|v:closed|2.postedit: There's the maintenance door, shut tight.

a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:ajar|0.text: The maintenance door stands slightly ajar. Darkness inside.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:ajar|0.postedit: The maintenance door stands slightly ajar. Darkness inside.

a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:ajar|1.text: The service door is open a crack, though you never saw it open.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:ajar|1.postedit: The service door is open a crack, though you never saw it open.

a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:ajar|2.text: The grey door is ajar; a thin black gap where it should be flush.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:ajar|2.postedit: The grey door is ajar; a thin black gap where it should be flush.

a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:gone|0.text: There is no maintenance door in the left wall. Just smooth wall.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:gone|0.postedit: There is no maintenance door in the left wall. Just smooth wall.

a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:gone|1.text: The service door is missing entirely.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:gone|1.postedit: The service door is missing entirely.

a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:gone|2.text: The left wall is unbroken, no door at all.
a:hallway-eight|p:door|x:gone|2.postedit: The left wall is unbroken, no door at all.

a:hallway-eight|p:camera|v:away|0.text: A small CCTV camera in the corner points down the corridor.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|v:away|0.postedit: A small CCTV camera in the corner points down the corridor.

a:hallway-eight|p:camera|v:away|1.text: The security camera watches the far end, angled away from you.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|v:away|1.postedit: The security camera watches the far end, angled away from you.

a:hallway-eight|p:camera|v:away|2.text: Up in the corner, the camera faces ahead, as always.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|v:away|2.postedit: Up in the corner, the camera faces ahead, as always.

a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:atyou|0.text: The CCTV camera has turned. It points directly at you.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:atyou|0.postedit: The CCTV camera has turned. It points directly at you.

a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:atyou|1.text: The security camera is angled down at you now.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:atyou|1.postedit: The security camera is angled down at you now.

a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:atyou|2.text: The camera in the corner faces you, its lens level with your eyes.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:atyou|2.postedit: The camera in the corner faces you, its lens level with your eyes.

a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:red|0.text: A red light blinks on the camera. It never used to blink.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:red|0.postedit: A red light blinks on the camera. It never used to blink.

a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:red|1.text: The camera's recording light glows red for the first time.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:red|1.postedit: The camera's recording light glows red for the first time.

a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:red|2.text: The little LED on the camera pulses red.
a:hallway-eight|p:camera|x:red|2.postedit: The little LED on the camera pulses red.

a:hallway-eight|p:floor|v:dry|0.text: The grey floor tiles stretch away, dry and dull.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|v:dry|0.postedit: The grey floor tiles stretch away, dry and dull.

a:hallway-eight|p:floor|v:dry|1.text: Underfoot, the usual scuffed grey tiles.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|v:dry|1.postedit: Underfoot, the usual scuffed grey tiles.

a:hallway-eight|p:floor|v:dry|2.text: The tiled floor is dry, reflecting nothing.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|v:dry|2.postedit: The tiled floor is dry, reflecting nothing.

a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:wet|0.text: The tiles ahead shine with a wet, dark sheen.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:wet|0.postedit: The tiles ahead shine with a wet, dark sheen.

a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:wet|1.text: The floor is wet, though you saw no one clean it.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:wet|1.postedit: The floor is wet, though you saw no one clean it.

a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:wet|2.text: A slick of water spreads across the tiles.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:wet|2.postedit: A slick of water spreads across the tiles.

a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:cracked|0.text: A crack runs across the floor tiles that wasn't there before.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:cracked|0.postedit: A crack runs across the floor tiles that wasn't there before.

a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:cracked|1.text: One of the floor tiles is split down the middle.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:cracked|1.postedit: One of the floor tiles is split down the middle.

a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:cracked|2.text: The tiling is fractured in a jagged line ahead.
a:hallway-eight|p:floor|x:cracked|2.postedit: The tiling is fractured in a jagged line ahead.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|v:steady|0.text: The corridor feels exactly as long as it always has.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|v:steady|0.postedit: The corridor feels exactly as long as it always has.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|v:steady|1.text: You carry the same low dread you've had since the lobby.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|v:steady|1.postedit: You carry the same low dread you've had since the lobby.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|v:steady|2.text: Everything feels ordinary, in the way this place is ever ordinary.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|v:steady|2.postedit: Everything feels ordinary, in the way this place is ever ordinary.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:longer|0.text: The corridor feels longer this time, though you can't say why.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:longer|0.postedit: The corridor feels longer this time, though you can't say why.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:longer|1.text: The far end seems further off than it should be.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:longer|1.postedit: The far end seems further off than it should be.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:longer|2.text: The walls feel as if they've stretched since the last stretch.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:longer|2.postedit: The walls feel as if they've stretched since the last stretch.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:forget|0.text: For a moment you can't remember how many doors you've passed.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:forget|0.postedit: For a moment you can't remember how many doors you've passed.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:forget|1.text: You lose your count of the corridors, and it unsettles you.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:forget|1.postedit: You lose your count of the corridors, and it unsettles you.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:forget|2.text: You can't recall why you're down here at all.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:forget|2.postedit: You can't recall why you're down here at all.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:calm|0.text: You feel suddenly, wrongly calm, as if you'd already escaped.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:calm|0.postedit: You feel suddenly, wrongly calm, as if you'd already escaped.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:calm|1.text: A strange relief washes over you that has no business being here.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:calm|1.postedit: A strange relief washes over you that has no business being here.

a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:calm|2.text: You feel no fear at all, and that itself feels wrong.
a:hallway-eight|p:sense|x:calm|2.postedit: You feel no fear at all, and that itself feels wrong.

a:hallway-eight|adaptive|repeat_inspect|.text: You glance at the {THING} again. You aren't sure why.
a:hallway-eight|adaptive|repeat_inspect|.postedit: You glance at the {THING} again. You aren't sure why.

a:hallway-eight|adaptive|repeat_inspect|.text: Your eyes go straight to the {THING}, the way they always seem to now.
a:hallway-eight|adaptive|repeat_inspect|.postedit: Your eyes go straight to the {THING}, the way they always seem to now.

a:hallway-eight|adaptive|repeat_inspect|.text: The {THING} draws your attention once more.
a:hallway-eight|adaptive|repeat_inspect|.postedit: The {THING} draws your attention once more.

a:hallway-eight|adaptive|long_look|0.text: You spend longer looking than usual. You don't remember deciding to stop.
a:hallway-eight|adaptive|long_look|0.postedit: You spend longer looking than usual. You don't remember deciding to stop.

a:hallway-eight|adaptive|long_look|1.text: You realise you've been standing still. For how long?
a:hallway-eight|adaptive|long_look|1.postedit: You realise you've been standing still. For how long?

a:hallway-eight|adaptive|long_look|2.text: Time slips. You were staring, and you don't know for how long.
a:hallway-eight|adaptive|long_look|2.postedit: Time slips. You were staring, and you don't know for how long.

a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|2.text: You stayed too late. The lobby doors are locked, the lights half-out.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|2.postedit: You stayed too late. The lobby doors are locked, the lights half-out.

a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|3.text: A handwritten sign hangs over them: FIRE EXIT, USE CORRIDOR.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|3.postedit: A handwritten sign hangs over them: FIRE EXIT, USE CORRIDOR.

a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|5.text: While a stretch of corridor is exactly as you remember it, walk on.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|5.postedit: While a stretch of corridor is exactly as you remember it, walk on.

a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|6.text: If anything has changed, the way has doubled back. Return the way you came.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|6.postedit: If anything has changed, the way has doubled back. Return the way you came.

a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|8.text: The eighth fire door leads out.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|8.postedit: The eighth fire door leads out.

a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|9.text: Lose track of what you've seen, and the building returns you to the start.
a:hallway-eight|framing|intro|9.postedit: Lose track of what you've seen, and the building returns you to the start.

a:hallway-eight|framing|win|0.text: The eighth fire door gives under your hands.
a:hallway-eight|framing|win|0.postedit: The eighth fire door gives under your hands.

a:hallway-eight|framing|win|1.text: Cold air. A stairwell down to the street. The city, still there.
a:hallway-eight|framing|win|1.postedit: Cold air. A stairwell down to the street. The city, still there.

a:hallway-eight|framing|win|2.text: You were beginning to think the corridor had no end.
a:hallway-eight|framing|win|2.postedit: You were beginning to think the corridor had no end.
